title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting, generating embeddings, pulling models, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that talks to the local Ollama API; supports chat, multi-model, RAG, etc.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing a fluent builder API for chatting, pulling models, listing tags, and streaming responses.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby methods and blocks.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI client written in Rust for interactive chat, model management, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin that uses Ollama models for local code completion inside VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Dockerfiles and compose examples for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) containers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that registers Ollama models as generators and embedders for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK providing strongly-typed HttpClient wrappers and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-nvidia-chat
summary: NVIDIA reference project showing optimized Ollama deployment on RTX GPUs with TensorRT-LLM backends.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for building RAG pipelines using Ollama embeddings + LangChain + Chroma.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into guild channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Community Slack bot that listens for mentions and replies with locally generated text from Ollama.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for IDE assistants and tools.

title: ollama-reddit-discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.1.11 release adding native tool/function calling support and community reactions.
